themes.label: Covenant
themes.summary: This chapter points to covenant, promise, oath, inheritance, or the enduring faithfulness of God. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 6 verses. Commentary leans on "This is the inheritance of the tribe of the children of Judah according to their families —th...". Word-study detail reinforces "בְרָכָ֗ה: me a blessing - benediction; by implication prosperity".
